title: AdventureFast Server
description: Serverside Modpack that adds a lot of new Structures and features without needing to install anything on client!
body:
This is an all serverside modpack:

Say goodbye to new players complaining about new server mods!

**Features**:
- A lot of New Structures that you can explore and get items
- Better world generation with a good looking trees.
- Quality of Life mods that helps players progress on the server.
- Higher World height, you can built up to 2032 blocks.
